data.name: Magebuster: Amorous Augury
data.detailed_description:
An arrogant mage girl summons a powerful spirit to be her servant.

He fights back in a duel, using powerful magic spells.

Will he defeat the girl and keep his freedom, or will she overwhelm him?

----------

Magebuster: Amorous Augury is a visual novel and RPG hybrid, centering around a multi-stage boss fight against Sophia the mage. She changes her tactics time-and-again in an attempt to enslave you, so bring your best spell-slinging ability!

Winning or losing will lead to one of six different endings, each involving erotic content.

Each line of script has been meticulously animated to arouse, with plenty of variation in character expressions and scene progression.

The game also features original music composed in a unique style, featuring classical instruments like harpsichord alongside upbeat symphonic rock.

And the cherry on top is full English voice acting performed by Belgerum and Silkymilk, bringing the characters to life and adding further depth to the plot.

Get ready to bust that mage and win your freedom!

data.short_description: Fight a magic duel against a haughty mage girl, and show her the power of an evil spirit in an erotic RPG visual novel!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
